hero.title: Technology and peace of mind
hero.description: Software development, consulting on digital solutions, management platforms, and security and smart-home installations. One team to connect what you run in the cloud with what you need on the ground.

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: Two lines of work you can combine: product engineering and systems for home or business.

engineering.title: Serious software engineering — no fluff, no throwaway code
engineering.intro: We don't ship low-quality quick fixes or promise what we can't sustain. We work to clear standards: understandable design, testing where it matters, and technical debt kept under control. We're original on every build, ethical on contracts and data, and loyal to clients long after the first release.
points: We solve real needs: less operational friction, faster processes, and more predictable delivery or service.
Maintainable, documented code so your team or ours can evolve the product with confidence.
Transparency on scope, risk, and cost — we won't sell you features you won't use just to inflate the invoice.

software.title: Software development
software.description: Tailored web apps and backends, integrations, and continuous delivery — built to last, not to become obsolete in a few months.

consulting.title: Solution consulting
consulting.description: Straight talk on tech and business: architecture, priorities, and a roadmap you can actually ship and maintain.

platforms.title: Management platforms
platforms.description: Automation and dashboards that structure your ops: less manual work, better traceability, and sharper decisions with the same headcount.

security.title: Security & smart home
security.description: Alarms, video surveillance, electric fencing, and automation for home or business.

partners.title: Technology brands and alliances
partners.lead: We are AWS and Google Cloud partners: we design, deploy, and operate cloud workloads with strong security and cost discipline. We also build with blockchain and Web3 — from enterprise traceability to wallet integrations and smart contracts.

showcase.title: What our work looks like
showcase.subtitle: A short video glimpse of the kinds of environments and projects we support — from code to rollout.
showcase.videoAria: Video of technical work and collaboration

caseStudies.title: Case studies
caseStudies.subtitle: Scope and outcomes across software, consulting, and installation projects.

items.title: Unified inventory and order platform
items.summary: Regional chain with multiple locations: lightweight ERP integration, internal store app, and automated replenishment alerts.
items.result: Roughly 40% fewer inventory errors and faster daily close-outs.

items.title: Architecture and roadmap for a digital product
items.summary: Growing fintech: technical debt review, API module definition, and phased delivery plan with measurable milestones.
items.result: First-quarter improvements shipped without stopping critical operations.

items.title: Cameras, electric fence, and access app
items.summary: Home and small business on the same property: IP cameras, integrated perimeter fence, and mobile notifications for the owner.
items.result: Single dashboard for cameras and alarm status, with post-install support.

successStories.title: Success stories
successStories.subtitle: Recent deliveries across education, retail, agro, health, logistics, and physical security — built for Latin American teams and users.

platforms.title: End-to-end academic digital ecosystem
platforms.solution: Multi-program college: mobile app for students and web portal for faculty and admin. Live grades, QR attendance, elective enrollment, push notices, and tuition module linked to a regional payment gateway.
platforms.tech: React Native · Next.js · NestJS · PostgreSQL · Redis · FCM · payments REST API
platforms.result: Less operational load on enrollment and comms; faster student inquiries and a single channel for official notices.

platforms.title: Centralized inventory and sales
platforms.solution: Chain across several cities: live stock per branch, inter-store transfers, e-invoicing integration, and regional management reporting.
platforms.tech: Next.js · Node.js · TypeScript · PostgreSQL · BullMQ · e-invoicing API
platforms.result: Unified inventory visibility; fewer count discrepancies and quicker month-end closes across stores.

platforms.title: Lot traceability on blockchain
platforms.solution: Exporter: custody chain from field and packing plant to container. QR labels and NFC reads, events on a permissioned ledger, and auditor/buyer portal.
platforms.tech: Hyperledger Fabric · Node.js · Express · React · IPFS (documents) · PostgreSQL off-chain
platforms.result: Origin and movements verified in minutes; smoother audits and clearer answers to buyer questions.

platforms.title: Scheduling, reminders, and telehealth
platforms.solution: Clinic network: online booking, WhatsApp reminders, concise patient record, and gated video rooms per clinician.
platforms.tech: Vue 3 · Laravel · MySQL · Redis · WhatsApp Business API · WebRTC
platforms.result: Fewer no-shows and a calmer waiting room; better room utilization without double-booking.

platforms.title: Same-day routing and proof of delivery
platforms.solution: Last-mile operator: zone-based courier assignment, map tracking, delivery proof with photo and e-signature, polygon-based pricing.
platforms.tech: React · FastAPI · Python · PostGIS · Mapbox · Celery
platforms.result: More on-time deliveries in the promised window and fewer status disputes.

security.title: Smart home, video intercom, and unified scenes
security.solution: High-rise residential: lighting and blind automation, environment sensors, Ezviz video intercom and indoor Hikvision cameras in one mobile app; time-based rules and push alerts for concierge and owners.
security.tech: Ezviz · Hikvision (Wi-Fi / PoE) · Zigbee · IP gateway · MQTT · unified mobile app
security.result: Lower wasted lighting, verified visitors from the phone, and away-from-home scenes ready to arm.

security.title: Paradox alarm install with Hikvision / Ezviz CCTV
security.solution: High-traffic store: Paradox panel with PIR and door contacts, self-contained outdoor siren and central monitoring link; Hikvision domes and Ezviz points with NVR in a secure closet, Cat6 structured cabling and channel labeling.
security.tech: Paradox · Hikvision · Ezviz · ONVIF NVR · PoE · fiber to guard room
security.result: Audited open/close workflows; continuous recording with fast search on alarm events.
security.imageAlt: Security and connected devices in retail

security.title: Electric perimeter fence and CCTV towers
security.solution: Open yard: zoned electric fence with mesh and signage, Hikvision IR bullet towers on fiber backhaul to the guard post, redundant NVR and site-to-site VPN to headquarters.
security.tech: Electric energizers · Hikvision outdoor · fiber optic · redundant NVR · VPN
security.result: Strong deterrence at the property line; clear evidence of perimeter breaches and resilient remote viewing.

testimonials.subtitle: What clients highlight about working with us.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A clear process so you know what to expect at each stage.

step1.title: Discovery
step1.description: We listen to goals, context, and constraints. We define initial scope and risks.

step2.title: Proposal
step2.description: We share options, timelines, and a transparent estimate before moving forward.

step3.title: Delivery
step3.description: Incremental delivery, frequent communication, and support at go-live and beyond.

about.title: About BITFLOW
about.description: A team focused on real outcomes: code, infrastructure, and field work when it matters.
about.paragraph1: BITFLOW brings together software development and security and automation projects for those who need a technical partner close to the work.
about.paragraph2: We work with SMBs, independents, and households that want to modernize operations or strengthen security with serious installations.
about.imageAlt: Team collaborating on a technology project

cta.title: Have a technical challenge or a project in mind?
cta.description: Tell us where you are and we will reply with concrete next steps.

q1.question: Do you serve only businesses or also homes?
q1.answer: Both. Development and consulting usually target businesses and teams; security and smart home includes residential and commercial installations.

q2.question: How is a software project quoted?
q2.answer: After an initial conversation we define scope, deliverables, and engagement model (project-based or phased). There is no charge for that first assessment.

q3.question: Do you offer maintenance or support afterward?
q3.answer: Yes. We can agree on evolutionary support, monitoring, or visits depending on the solution delivered.

q4.question: Which areas do you cover for security installations?
q4.answer: We align per project. Share location and type of installation in the form and we will confirm availability.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Leave your details and a short summary. We will reply by email or, if you prefer, coordinate via WhatsApp.
contact.name: Name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your need, timeline, or location if relevant.
contact.success: Thank you. We received your message and will get back to you soon.

chatbot.title: Online advisor
chatbot.subtitle: BITFLOW
chatbot.contactHint: Fill in the form and choose WhatsApp or email — we open a ready-to-send message.
chatbot.requiredHint: Name and at least one channel (email or phone) help us reply properly.
chatbot.greeting: Hi — I'm BITFLOW's virtual assistant. I can guide you on custom software, platforms, consulting, security, smart home, brands we work with, and next steps. What do you need?

answers.services: BITFLOW combines **software & platforms** (custom development, consulting, management and automation) and **physical security** (alarms, CCTV, electric fences, smart home). See **What we do** for details.
answers.software: We build custom web apps and backends, integrations, and ongoing evolution. We focus on maintainable code and clear scope — see the **Software engineering, no shortcuts** block under Services.
answers.consulting: Consulting covers architecture, priorities, and a roadmap you can actually ship and maintain — without inflated promises.
answers.platforms: We design management and automation platforms to streamline operations: inventory, workflows, reporting, and less repetitive manual work.
answers.security: We install and integrate alarms, IP video surveillance, perimeter electric fences, and smart-home scenes for homes and businesses, using professional-grade brands.
answers.fence: Electric fences are planned by zones, with signage and tie-in to alarm or CCTV where the project requires it. Success stories include an industrial-style example.
answers.domotics: We work with Zigbee, Matter, Wi‑Fi, KNX ecosystems and brands like Aqara or Sonoff when they fit the design; we integrate scenes, sensors, and apps.
answers.brandsCctv: For video we typically use **Hikvision**, **Ezviz**, and **Dahua**, NVR/VMS, and ONVIF. **Technology partners** lists the ecosystem.
answers.brandsAlarm: For intrusion we use professional gear such as **Paradox**, DSC, or Honeywell depending on site design and local norms.
answers.brandsAccess: **ZKTeco** and access control (readers, biometrics, turnstiles) can be integrated with HR or visitor flows when needed.
answers.cloud: We're **AWS and Google Cloud partners**: we design and run cloud workloads with solid security and cost practices. More under **Technology partners**.
answers.blockchain: We build with **blockchain & Web3**: Hyperledger Fabric, Ethereum/L2, IPFS, smart contracts, and wallet integration when the use case fits (e.g. traceability).
answers.partners: **Technology partners** lists cloud, blockchain, software, alarms, CCTV, access, and smart-home brands and stacks we use.
answers.successStories: **Success stories** highlights real deliveries: education, retail, agri with ledger traceability, health, logistics, and three security projects with sample video.
answers.caseStudies: **Case studies** describes scope and outcomes for retail-style, fintech/consulting, and residential CCTV + fence projects — always tailored.
answers.pricing: Every quote depends on scope, integrations, and whether field work is involved. The first scoping conversation has no cost. Use the contact form or the button below for options.
answers.location: Software work is remote with online meetings. Physical installs are scheduled by location and project type — tell us your city and needs when you reach out.
answers.timing: Timelines depend on deliverable size and permits on site. **How we work** explains diagnosis, proposal, and phased delivery.
answers.process: Typical flow: **diagnosis** (goals and risks), **proposal** (clear scope and estimate), and **implementation** in milestones with handover support.
answers.about: BITFLOW is led by Ing. Darío Vélez Román, Ms. We combine product engineering with security installs when clients want one technical point of contact.
answers.audience: We serve **businesses and homes**: software and consulting are often SMEs and teams; security and smart home covers residential and commercial.
answers.contactPrompt: To reach the team, use the **contact form** on the page or tap **I want to be contacted** below — I'll prepare WhatsApp or email with your details.
answers.fallback: I don't have an exact auto-reply for that. Try a keyword (software, alarms, CCTV, quote, AWS, blockchain…) or use the assistant contact form and a human will reply.

footer.tagline: Technology solutions, software, and integrated security.
